design_decisions: Added `_game_history` to backend state, persisting last backup, restore, skip, and failure per game.
Updated `refresh_games` to return history in all result payloads.
Added `gameHistory` state to frontend and rendered a compact 'Last Operation' row for the selected game.
Implemented robust history loading and sanitization to handle malformed state.
Used `_record_history` helper to centralize history updates and persistence.
results: All 140 tests passing (including 12 new history tests). Backend and frontend successfully integrated. UI shows compact history row.
